demo_note: Fictionalized product input for portfolio use only.
business_request: Create a streaming ads measurement dashboard that helps Ad Delivery, Measurement, Revenue Ops, Data Quality, and Privacy teams decide whether daily ad reporting is ready to publish.

priority_kpis.consent_safe_measurement_coverage: events with valid consent mode / measurable events

constraints: Do not publish reports when consent mode is missing or invalid.
Do not treat directional revenue impact as billing truth.
Show blocker gates separately from warning checks.
Keep example company names clearly marked as demo-only context.
